reason: This is a single Stroop replication dataset from a course assignment, not a corpus/database. It has affirmative self-described replication evidence and may be usable only as an individual replication pair if original and replication D/N can be reconstructed.

route_payload.replication_relation_evidence: The OSF title/metadata identifies this as a replication study dataset. It still needs screening to identify the original target and determine whether D/N can be reconstructed.
